title: Generic Elements of a Blockchain
description: A flowchart illustrating the core components of a blockchain and how they interact to form a secure, immutable chain.
relationships: A Block contains a Header (with its own Hash, Previous Block Hash, and Nonce) and a list of Transactions. The Previous Block Hash in each header cryptographically links it to the previous block, forming a chain. The chain is replicated and validated across a Peer-to-Peer Network, creating a Distributed Ledger.
